Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 219. Arrival of Deportees (ABL 0325)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

a-na ⸢LUGAL⸣ EN-⸢ia⸣

(1) To the king, my lord: your servant(s) Aplaiu, Šarru-lu-dari and Išmanni-Aššur. Good health to the king, my lord!

o 22

ARAD-ka mDUMU.UŠ-ia

o 33

mMAN—lu—dà-⸢ri⸣ mḪAL-a-ni—aš-šur

o 44

⸢lu⸣-u DI-mu a-⸢na⸣ LUGAL EN-⸢ia⸣

o 55

UD 10-KÁM ša ITI.⸢ŠU*⸣

(5) The deportees [arrived] on the 10th of Tammuz (IV); the horses [......] fodder [......] in our towns.

o 66

⸢LÚv*.šag*-lu*⸣-te [x x x x]

o 77

⸢ANŠE.KUR⸣.RA-MEŠ [x x x x]

o 88

ŠE.ki-su*-⸢tú⸣ [x x x x]

o 99

ina ŠÀ ⸢URU⸣-MEŠ-ni [x x x x]

o 1010

⸢ša⸣ LÚv.šag-lu-[te x x x]

(10) The harvest of the deportee[s ...] had come out well; they brought along all the food they had. The deportees and the pack animals are eating stored grain [...] like the king's servants.

o 1111

ŠE.e-bu-ru-šú-nu i-di-mi*-⸢iq*⸣ [a—dan-niš]

o 1212

⸢NINDA?⸣-MEŠ am—mar ina [IGI]-šú-nu i-ta-⸢ṣu⸣-ni

o 1313

LÚv.šag-lu-te ANŠE.ṣap-pu

o 1414

ŠE.tab*-ku* KÚ

o 1515

[x]+⸢x a*-ki*⸣ LÚv.ARAD-MEŠ-ni ša LUGAL

o 1616

[x x x]-a a-na LÚv.šag-lu-te

(16) The deportees and the pack animals are [well]; the king, my lord, [can be] pleased.

o 1717

[x x x] a-na a-ṣap-pi

o 1818

[ŠÀ-bu ša] LUGAL EN-ia lu DÙG.GA

Reverse
rr uninscribed

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334211/.
